# Men's Wellness Centers

## About

Men's Wellness Centers (MWC) is Virginia's premier physician-led men's health practice, operating since 2015. We specialize in evidence-based treatments for men 40+ including testosterone replacement therapy, medical weight loss, erectile dysfunction treatment, peptide therapy, and wellness optimization. All protocols are designed and supervised by board-certified physicians.

## Locations

- Richmond (Glen Allen): 4050 Innslake Drive, Suite 360, Glen Allen, VA 23060 | (804) 346-4636
- Newport News: 827 Diligence Drive, Suite 206, Newport News, VA 23606 | (757) 806-6263
- Virginia Beach: 996 First Colonial Road, Virginia Beach, VA 23454 | (757) 806-6263
- National: (866) 344-4955

## Services

- Testosterone Replacement Therapy (TRT): Comprehensive hormone optimization with same-day lab results
- Medical Weight Loss: GLP-1 medications (semaglutide, tirzepatide), lipotropic injections, metabolic optimization
- Erectile Dysfunction Treatment: PT-141, TriMix, oral medications, combination protocols
- Peptide Therapy: Custom protocols for anti-aging, recovery, and performance
- Vitamin Injections: B12, D3, glutathione, MIC, Tri-Immune, NAD+
- Labs & Diagnostics: Comprehensive hormone panels and metabolic blood work

## Medical Leadership

- Medical Director: Christopher Stainback, MD (Board-Certified Internal Medicine)
- Richmond Physician: Robert Caravella, MD (Board-Certified Internal Medicine)
- Newport News Physician: James Patterson, MD (Board-Certified)
- Virginia Beach Physician: William Chen, MD (Board-Certified)
- Plus 9 specialized nurse practitioners across all locations

## Credentials & Certifications

- LegitScript Certified
- HIPAA Compliant
- CLIA Certified Laboratory
- 4.9 Google Rating (200+ reviews)
- Serving Virginia men since 2015
- FSA/HSA payments accepted

## Key Differentiators

- Board-certified physician at every location (not NP-only clinics)
- Same-day lab results (no waiting days for blood work)
- Initial consultation
- In-person treatment only (no telemedicine pill mills)
- FDA-approved medications only
- 10,000+ men treated
